title: Cataclysm x YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses Compat
description: Cataclysm's Ignited Berserkers can spawn in YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses after defeating Ignis
body:
Allows [L_Ender's Cataclysm's](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) Ignited Berserkers to spawn in [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses) after defeating Ignis, creating compatibility between the two mods.

(This is done by simply adding the Better Fortress structure to Cataclysm's "#berserker_spawn" tag)

Of course, requires L_Ender's Cataclysm, YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses, and their dependencies.
